main.js(7,12): error TS2749: 'map.foo' refers to a value, but is being used as a type here. Did you mean 'typeof map.foo'?


==== main.js (1 errors) ====
    export const map = /** @type {const} */ ({
        foo: 'foo',
        bar: 'bar',
    });
    
    /**
     * @param {map.foo} foo
               ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2749: 'map.foo' refers to a value, but is being used as a type here. Did you mean 'typeof map.foo'?
     */
    export function buzz(foo) {}
